title: Makefile: set GO111MODULE=off
body:
Turn of go modules to avoid breaking build environments to accidentally
try pulling the dependencies instead of using the ./vendor directory.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

That looks like a network flake causing a nil dereference. I restarted the job and copied the stack trace.
